use_cases: Main site navigation with dropdown menus for hierarchical content
Application header navigation with hover-activated dropdowns
E-commerce site navigation with product category dropdowns
Dashboard or admin interface navigation with animated cursor indicator
ai_summary: A React navbar component featuring hover-activated dropdown menus with smooth Framer Motion animations. Includes a cursor line indicator that animates between navigation items and dropdown menus that slide in on hover. Built with Next.js Link components and TypeScript for type-safe menu configurations.
